Contact Us
Forest Lake Shopping Centre, 235 Forest Lake Boulevard, Forest Lake, QLD 4078
View on Map
Welcome Here
Keep up-to-date with the latest events

I agree to the privacy policy and wish to receive Forest Lake Shopping Centre's newsletter containing the latest news and offers.

 

We acknowledge and respect the traditional lands and cultures of the Jagera, Yuggera and Ugarapul peoples of Ipswich and Springfield, the Traditional Owners and Custodians of the Country on which Forest Lake Shopping Centre resides, and pay our respects to Elders past and present. We recognise Frist Nations peoples' longstanding and ongoing spiritual connections to land, sea, community, and country.
